---
title: "About"
image: lamenn.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: file-pdf
      text: CV
      href: "cv/index.qmd"
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/lucascoutoz
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} ResearchGate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Lucas-Couto-2
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/lucas_coutoz
---

Welcome!

I am Lucas, and I am a PhD Student in Political Science at [Aarhus University](https://ps.au.dk/en). Before that, I did my BSc and MSc in Political Science at [University of Brasília](http://ipol.unb.br/). My research interest lie predominantly in Coalition Politics, Comparative Politics, Comparative Political Behaviour, and Legislative Studies.

Most of my work departs from a comparative perspective and has appeared in *European Political Science Review*, *Latin American Politics and Society*, amongst other international and Brazilian national outlets.

I am passionate about learning research methods, and I have a long-term goal of becoming familiar with a wide range of research techniques in Political Science! Thus far, I rely on configurational comparative methods, quantitative methods, and survey experiments in my research.
